aleabit.layer_label: Layer 3 — 谐波减速器（humanoid joint core）
aleabit.verdict_label: thesis 有效但已被市场充分发现
aleabit.thesis: China's Harmonic Drive — the closest analogue to Japan's HDS. Real chokepoint in humanoid joints, but at 600+ yi mcap and PB 17, every long/short fund in China already owns it. Crowded.

signals.name: 供应链汇聚
signals.note: 几乎所有国产人形机器人厂商都把它列为谐波减速器主供

signals.name: 分析师覆盖率 < 3
signals.note: 国内外机构全覆盖，研报量极大

signals.name: 技术深度门槛
signals.note: 谐波减速器精度/寿命门槛极高，柔轮材料 + 加工 know-how

signals.name: 政府/国防关联
signals.note: 进入军工/航天减速器供应链

signals.name: CEO 二级市场买入
signals.note: 未见显著创始人增持信号

signals.name: 小盘 + 关键产能
signals.note: 市值已 600+ 亿 RMB，不是小盘

red_flags: 市值 600+ 亿，PB 17 估值极贵
humanoid 主题股，叙事溢价显著
aleabit.ai_relevance: Humanoid robot 在 AI 物理化叙事下的核心节点，但已 priced in
